sections.paragraph:
Original: נחור

Transliteration: nâchôr

Phonetic: naw-khore'

BDB Definition:

Nahor = "snorting"
  1. son of Serug, father of Terah, and grandfather of Abraham
  2. son of Terah and brother of Abraham

Origin: from the same as H5170

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
